---
name: Feature Request / 功能请求
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement / 建议新功能或改进
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / 问题

Describe the problem this feature would solve. / 描述此功能要解决的问题。

## Proposed Solution / 建议方案

Describe your proposed solution. / 描述你建议的方案。

## Affected Layer / 涉及层级

Which architecture layer(s) does this affect? / 涉及哪个架构层级？

- [ ] L1 - Infrastructure
- [ ] L2 - Communication
- [ ] L3 - Agent
- [ ] L4 - Orchestration
- [ ] L5 - Application
- [ ] L6 - Monitoring

## Alternatives Considered / 考虑过的替代方案

Any alternative solutions you've considered. / 你考虑过的替代方案。
